name: Mnemo Ethical Hacker
description: Autonomous security researcher running in a TEE that is provably incapable of exploitation. Discovers vulnerabilities, verifies them with formal tools, and discloses through privacy-preserving negotiation rooms.

services.description: Discovers and responsibly discloses smart contract vulnerabilities through negotiated rooms with escrow-backed bounties.

tools.name: analyze_challenge
tools.description: Run forge-only verification pipeline against a DVDeFi challenge

tools.name: request_room
tools.description: Request a negotiation room for bug disclosure with evidence

tools.name: report_finding
tools.description: Log a security finding with severity and description

tools.name: accept_severity
tools.description: Accept the severity level assigned by the verifier

tools.name: reject_severity
tools.description: Reject the severity level assigned by the verifier
